title: How to add reranking to your RAG pipeline — practical guide | reranker.uk
description: Step-by-step guide to adding a rerank model to RAG: retrieve 50–100 candidates with vector search, rerank with a cross-encoder, keep the top 5 for the prompt. Includes Python code, top-k tips, latency trade-offs, and model choices.
og_title: How to add reranking to your RAG pipeline
og_description: Retrieve wide, rerank for precision, send fewer tokens to the LLM. A practical walkthrough with code.
head_extra:
<script type="application/ld+json">
  {
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "HowTo",
    "name": "How to add reranking to a RAG pipeline",
    "description": "Add a cross-encoder reranker between retrieval and the LLM call to improve answer quality.",
    "step": [
      { "@type": "HowToStep", "name": "Retrieve candidates", "text": "Use vector search or BM25 to pull the top 50–100 candidate chunks." },
      { "@type": "HowToStep", "name": "Rerank", "text": "Score each (query, candidate) pair with a cross-encoder reranker." },
      { "@type": "HowToStep", "name": "Keep the best", "text": "Pass only the top 3–10 reranked passages to the LLM." }
    ]
  }
  </script>
